Title: The Strangers: Chapter 2
Writer: Alan R. Cohen, Alan Freedland, Bryan Bertino
Actors: Madelaine Petsch, Gabriel Basso, Ema Horvath
Plot: Left stranded in a small town with no way out, Maya must once again face a night of terror courtesy of three deadly killers whose rampage she must put to an end.
Country: Spain, United States, Slovakia, Canada, United Kingdom
